journey.name: Verse Feed Browsing
journey.description: Test the core feed browsing flow: launch the app, verify the feed screen loads with bottom navigation, check tag filter strip, and try navigating to other tabs.

actions.action: Verify that the app is showing the Discover tab with "All" and "Following" tag chips visible
Verify that the bottom navigation bar is visible with "Discover", "Collections", and "Profile" tabs
Tap the "Collections" tab in the bottom navigation
Verify that a Collections screen is shown
Tap the "Profile" tab in the bottom navigation
Verify that a Profile screen is shown with a "Log in" button
Verify that a login screen is shown with "Email" and "Password" fields and a "Log in" button
Tap the "Discover" tab in the bottom navigation
Verify that the app returns to the feed screen with the tag chips visible
